purpose: Identify and deeply research Plotpoint's top 3 direct competitors to inform Q2 strategic positioning.
deliverable: A 6-page competitive analysis memo for the executive team, with structured profiles per competitor and a clear differentiation thesis.
audience: Plotpoint executive team — CEO, Head of Product, Head of Marketing.
scope_in: Top 3 direct competitors (after a wider candidate scan)
Profile each across product, pricing, target market, team, traction
Differentiation thesis: where Plotpoint can credibly win
scope_out: Indirect or adjacent competitors (general task tools beyond project planning)
success_criteria: Each final competitor has a complete profile across all 5 dimensions
Each finding cites at least one source
The memo lands a clear, evidence-backed differentiation thesis
Executive team comes away with a new view of the landscape
